title: Editing Scenarios
description: Four independent single images testing conversational editing logic across menus, product styling, interiors, and gallery layouts.
creative_direction: Each image is a self-contained before-and-after style editing scene that makes the requested semantic changes visually inferable while avoiding literal readable instructions.

en.title: Editing Scenarios
en.description: Four independent single images testing conversational editing logic across menus, product styling, interiors, and gallery layouts.

zh-CN.title: 编辑场景单图
zh-CN.description: 四张独立单图，分别测试菜单、产品配色、室内整理和展陈布局中的对话式编辑逻辑。
